title: Sapan Rak Sarasin
original_title: สะพานรักสารสิน
overview: There are no walls that can separate love between a man and a woman, but there are some parents who don't understand, even though those parents have themselves been through the same feelings in their youth. To stop their children from loving is like pushing them to be more rebellious.
